title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-1047
summary: Karamjit Singh Dhaliwal was accused of being part of a group that blackmailed a property developer, Kuldeep Singh, into paying ₹1 lakh and demanding ₹5 lakh more under threat of leaking nude photos taken without consent.
